description: Soura University (دانشگاه سوره) is an arts and communications university in Tehran affiliated with the [Islamic Propaganda Organization](/orgs/islamic-propaganda-organization) (Sazman-e Tabligh-e Eslami), which operates under the Supreme Leader. Founded in 1992, the university focuses on fine arts, cinema, theatre, graphic design, and communications — disciplines through which the regime cultivates culturally and ideologically aligned creative talent. [Mohammad-Ali Zam](/people/mohammad-ali-zam), the reformist cultural official and father of executed journalist Ruhollah Zam, served as the university's president, reflecting the institution's position at the intersection of regime cultural policy and reformist-conservative tensions.
editorial_notes: Arts university under Islamic Propaganda Organization. Mohammad-Ali Zam served as president.
